_note: Code-analysis-based estimates. Chrome not available on HP server (Windows crypto errors prevent Playwright). Scores derived from: bundle size analysis, font-loading strategy review, routing architecture, image optimization audit.

performance.title: Performance
_factors: No LCP image preload for galerie-01.jpg
Full React 19 + Router + GSAP bundle ~350KB gzip
No width/height on img elements (CLS risk)

accessibility.title: Accessibility
_factors: PLUS: skip-to-content, focus-visible, lang=de, alt texts, aria on main
MINUS: gold/creme contrast ratio ~2.4:1 (below WCAG AA 3:1 for normal text)
MINUS: no prefers-reduced-motion for ticker and GSAP spiral
MINUS: EventTicker not pauseable for screen readers

best-practices.title: Best Practices
_factors: PLUS: HTTPS, no mixed content, manifest.json, structured data
MINUS: AutoPlayVideo component uses useRef/useEffect without importing them

seo.title: SEO
_factors: PLUS: JSON-LD, OG/Twitter, canonical, geo meta, sitemap, robots.txt
MINUS: Hash-based routing - sub-pages not independently crawlable
MINUS: Sitemap contains hash URLs (#/schlosscafe) not indexable as separate pages
MINUS: usePageTitle hook provides titles but only after JS executes

render-blocking-resources.title: Eliminate render-blocking resources
render-blocking-resources.description: Google Fonts CSS loaded synchronously. Use font-display=swap and preload key font files.
